calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2020 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Streamsets, Inc'S Motion For Entry Of Default Judgement
Off Calendar Sep-17-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Marlene Cavalcanti.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Galen P. Sollomi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Streamsets, Inc., a Delaware corporation.
Shekhar Iyer and Jennifer Bao, President and VP of Finance, respectively, were placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Iyer and Ms. Bao appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Marlene Cavalcanti.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Duty of Loyalty, Conversion, Money Had and Received, and Injunctive Relief was filed on April 8, 2019.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons & Complaint on defendant Marlene Cavalcanti occurred on May 9, 2019, and was effectuated on May 23, 2019.
Default as to defendant Marlene Cavalcanti was entered on July 2, 2019.
No DOE defendants named in plaintiff's complaint.

Plaintiff Streamsets, Inc. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Monthly Corporate Credit Card Statements...................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Travel expenses incurred by defendant Marlene Cavalcanti...................ID/EVID
Exhibit 5: Defendant Marlene Cavalcanti's Employment Application......................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Streamsets, Inc., a Delaware corporation, and against the defaulted defendant Marlene Cavalcanti, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $41,457.23.
Costs - $1,431.01.

Total - $42,888.24.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
